caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seen in a recording studio, positioned in front of a grey acoustic foam wall. He is wearing a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. A professional silver microphone, mounted on a boom arm with a shock mount, is positioned directly in front of his face. He is speaking, and as the sequence progresses, his facial expressions shift slightly, with his mouth opening and closing and his eyes moving. In the second frame, his right hand is partially visible as he gestures. The lighting is consistent throughout, focusing on the man as he interacts with the microphone. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
